form.formComment: Returns from a 36-day let-up. At the latest run ran last of 11 at this track on March 1 over 1400m, 10 len behind Emblazon carrying 59kg at $37. Racing below his best and will need to improve sharply.

form.formComment: Gelding returning from a spell and has won previously when first up. Finished off last campaign second last of 12 at this track in the G3 Chinese Club Challenge Cup January 1 over 1400m, 6 len behind Storm Rider carrying 53kg at $18. Previously first up; eighth of 14 at this track in the G3 Celebration Cup September 28 over 1400m, 2.75 len behind My Wish with 54.5kg at $12. Expected to play a major role.

form.formComment: Third-up today and won third-up in the past. First-up favourite; won by 1.3 len at this track March 8 over 1400m defeating Super Express carrying 59.5kg at $6.80. Second-up favourite; raced right near the speed and boxed on; won by a neck at this track March 22 over 1400m defeating Six Pack with 51.5kg at $2.40. Profiles nicely. Can extend the winning streak.
